chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-200 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 15.09.2025. Mr. Badal Gahoti, Advocate for Petitioner a/w Petitioners. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant P.G for the State. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto, Assistant A.G Sindh a/w SIP Aslam Dad Niazi from PS Shah Latif Town, Malir Karachi. Pursuant to order dated 08.09.2025 passed by this Court in the instant Petition, an official on behalf of SHO PS Shah Latif Town, Malir Karachi is present and files comments alongwith copy of FIR bearing crime No.175 of 2025 U/s 365-B PPC and Section 3 of the Prevention of Trafficking in Persons Act, 2018 lodged by Respondent No.6 at PS Shah Latif Town. Petitioner No.1 Mst. Nazia is present and states that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Ghulam Muhammad Khoso (petitioner No.2) without any pressure, compulsion and coercion, which has caused very much annoyed to her family members who are issuing threats for dire consequences. She further states that she has not been abducted or enticed away by anyone including the petitioner No.2. Learned Counsel present for the Petitioners submits that he would be satisfied if the instant Petition is disposed of with directions to official Respondents for legal protection, however, he would avail proper remedy at proper forum regarding lodgment of FIR. Mr. A.A.G present in Court submits that official Respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioner within four corners of law. At this juncture, Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the Petition in said terms.

A.A.G present in Court submits that official Respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioner within four corners of law. At this juncture, Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the Petition in said terms. Page 2 of 2 In view of the above, instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to concerned SHO(s) to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the Petitioners, as and when approached. Office is directed to transmit a copy of this order to the Senior Superintendent of Police, Malir for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
